nasb.text: Now Bezalel made the ark of acacia wood; its length was two and a half cubits, and its width one and a half cubits, and its height one and a half cubits;

esv.text: Bezalel made the ark of acacia wood. Two cubits and a half was its length, a cubit and a half its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.

cnv.text: 比撒列用皂莢木做了一個櫃，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分，高六十六公分，

ccb.text: 比撒列用皂荚木造了一个柜，长一点一米，宽六十六厘米，高六十六厘米。
